title: Wemmbu's Rods
description: this mod gives you fishing rods inspired by the uu and some rods that are custom
body:
# Wemmbu's Rod Mod

5 rods. 1 purpose. `/Wemmburods <name>`

| Rod        | TNT         | What it does                              |
|------------|-------------|-------------------------------------------|
| orbital    | 2000+       | 11 rings of destruction                   |
| railgun    | 500~          | straight line blast                       |
| stairs     | 43           | spring thing. useless unless you want an elytra launcher.                   |
| stabshot   | ~500-indefinite (because it follows your y level)        | 3 tnt compressed into 1, one of many,  chain explodes to Y-30       |
| blackhole  | ???         | pulls entities, flings blocks, black sphere  |

---
(you get resistance 255 so you don't die. probably.)
1.21.11. lightweight.
more rods coming. `/Wemmburods <name>` to grab one.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

ill probably scrap this project as its really fun but im making more mods and this feels like one of many but holy does it get me money so i MIGHT update it, since i got better at coding and im actually tryna find a j*b so if you think i should update it.. idk dm me ---> Liquidify.net <--- ig bro

</details>
